chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1444 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Arslan Khokhar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Husain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that he is satisfied with the schedule provided by learned Counsel for respondents for payment of pensionary benefits, and does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
